prompt: A photorealistic portrait of an elderly Asian man with thin wire-rimmed glasses wearing a black double-breasted suit with a white shirt and black tie. He has a gentle, warm smile and is standing closely next to a large fluffy marmot. The animal is standing upright, resting its front paws on a textured wooden log. The background features a rustic outdoor garden with blank wooden signs, a vintage lantern on a post, lush greenery, and small colorful flowers. The image features soft natural lighting, high-quality photographic details, and a shallow depth of field creating a smooth bokeh effect in the background.
